entries.display_latex: \boldsymbol{S}^{\triangle(r, s, t)}=\sum_{\substack{i+j+k=p \\ i, j, k \geqslant 0}} B_{i, j, k, p}(r, s, t) \boldsymbol{c}_{i, j, k},

\mathbf{B}=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}
B_{0, p}\left(u_{0}^{s}\right) B_{0, q}\left(v_{0}^{s}\right) & \cdots & B_{p, p}\left(u_{0}^{s}\right) B_{q, q}\left(v_{0}^{s}\right)  \tag{101}\\
\vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\
B_{0, p}\left(u_{l}^{s}\right) B_{0, q}\left(v_{l}^{s}\right) & \cdots & B_{p, p}\left(u_{l}^{s}\right) B_{q, q}\left(v_{l}^{s}\right)
\end{array}\right],
